notes: 3.11.19 — GD B HOP NHAT PHIEU (hoan tat PA-1; FLAG_BATCH_UNIFIED bat): (B1) GHI CHI CA PHIEU = 1 FORM duy nhat — nut 💵 dong nhom (flag bat) mo form nhap 1 tong + PHI NH/PHI KHAC 1 LAN (phi gan DONG DAU — chot Sep), app phan bo FIFO (uu tien De xuat dot lam san, phan du tra not theo FIFO) thanh payments per dong trong 1 commit; tai dung nguyen ven chuan tien saveArPayment (schema pay, _arPayAmountInCcy, tru NH tong+phi, adjustedFromPlan, touchRecord); flag tat giu chuoi tuan tu 3.11.16. (B2) 1 LENH CHI DOT / PHIEU: nut ⚡ De xuat chi dot (ca phieu) trong modal chi tiet — 1 lenh gan dong dau (_batchOrder, note tag [CA PHIEU N DONG]), kha dung = tong(rem − lenh cho) per dong, di luong duyet thong nhat san co; ghi chi lenh → mo form ca phieu prefill so lenh, luu xong tu danh PAID. Verify: node --check PASS + test HAM THAT apBatchPaySaveOne/apProposeOrderBatch 11/11 (phan bo due-san + FIFO, phi dong dau duy nhat, NH tru tong+phi dung dong, vuot chan, USD thieu fx chan, 1 lenh/phieu, kha dung tru lenh cho, dong chua duyet chan ca phieu, order paid).
